title: Add Admin and Staff Portals

requirements.text: Add a dedicated Admin login flow page (similar to StudentLoginFlow and HODLoginFlow) that stores 'admin' as the pending role in localStorage before initiating Internet Identity authentication, and add an Admin role card on the LandingPage alongside the existing Student and HOD/Staff cards.

quotes: add both admin and staff portal also

acceptanceCriteria: A new AdminLoginFlow component exists and is reachable from the landing page
Clicking the Admin card on LandingPage navigates to the Admin login flow
The admin login flow stores 'admin' as pendingRole in localStorage before triggering Internet Identity login
After login, a user who selects admin role is directed to the admin dashboard

requirements.text: Add a dedicated Staff login flow page (similar to StudentLoginFlow and HODLoginFlow) that stores 'staff' as the pending role in localStorage before initiating Internet Identity authentication, and ensure the LandingPage includes a Staff role card entry point.

quotes: add both admin and staff portal also

acceptanceCriteria: A new StaffLoginFlow component exists and is reachable from the landing page
Clicking the Staff card on LandingPage navigates to the Staff login flow
The staff login flow stores 'staff' as pendingRole in localStorage before triggering Internet Identity login
After login, a user who selects staff role is directed to the staff dashboard

requirements.text: Build a full Admin Portal with a dedicated dashboard view showing system-wide complaint statistics (total, pending, resolved, high-priority across all departments), access to full complaint list management (view, update status/priority for all complaints), user management page, emergency logs, and analytics. The admin sidebar navigation should surface all admin-specific pages.

quotes: add both admin and staff portal also

acceptanceCriteria: Admin dashboard shows system-wide stats: total complaints, pending, resolved, and high-priority counts
Admin can view and update status/priority for any complaint regardless of department
Admin sidebar shows navigation items for Dashboard, Complaints, Analytics, User Management, Emergency Logs
Admin portal is only accessible when campusRole is 'admin'
AppSidebar renders correct admin nav items for the admin role

requirements.text: Build a full Staff Portal with a dedicated dashboard view showing complaints relevant to the staff member's department, ability to view and update complaint status for complaints in their department, and access to analytics filtered by their department. The staff sidebar navigation should surface all staff-specific pages.

quotes: add both admin and staff portal also

acceptanceCriteria: Staff dashboard shows department-scoped stats: total, pending, resolved, high-priority for their department
Staff can view and update status of complaints assigned to their department
Staff sidebar shows navigation items for Dashboard, Complaints, Analytics
Staff portal is only accessible when campusRole is 'staff'
AppSidebar renders correct staff nav items for the staff role

requirements.text: Update the ProfileSetupModal to allow 'admin' and 'staff' as selectable roles during profile setup, ensuring the role is correctly saved and encoded in the backend profile via the pipe-delimited format used in userProfileHelpers.

quotes: add both admin and staff portal also

acceptanceCriteria: ProfileSetupModal role dropdown includes 'admin' and 'staff' as options
Selecting admin or staff role saves correctly to the backend profile
The encoded profile name string correctly encodes the admin/staff role via userProfileHelpers

requirements.text: Update the backend main actor to ensure the 'staff' role is recognized in role-based permission checks alongside the existing 'admin', 'hod', and 'student' roles. Staff should be permitted to update complaint statuses for complaints in their department.

quotes: add both admin and staff portal also

acceptanceCriteria: The backend CampusRole type or equivalent includes 'staff' as a valid role
Permission checks allow staff to update complaint status
Admin retains full access to all complaint operations

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Admin and staff login flows must follow the same Internet Identity authentication pattern as StudentLoginFlow and HODLoginFlow
Role encoding must use the existing pipe-delimited format in userProfileHelpers.ts
nonGoals: Separate backend deployments or microservices for admin/staff
Email or SMS alerts for admin/staff
